question: Which privacy-safe stable Payment Instrument and cardholder identifiers are available across the initial accounts and notification or statement evidence?
context: Validate against private fixtures before design. Full card or account numbers are prohibited; missing attribution must remain explicit, and Hermes may map provider wording only to stable Tally identifiers.
decision: Use stable local Tally ULIDs as authoritative Payment Instrument and cardholder identities, owner-managed labels, optional masked suffixes, and explicit unknown states. Full provider identifiers are prohibited; Hermes may map provider wording to these IDs. Private fixtures still validate mappings before production entry.
